["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":[["$r","a",null,{"href":"http://gnuradio.org/redmine/projects/pybombs/wiki","rel":"nofollow","children":"PyBOMBS"}]," (Python Build Overlay Managed Bundle System) 是 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"http://gnuradio.org/","rel":"nofollow","children":"GNU Radio"}]," 的包管理系统。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["本镜像使用 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"http://github.com/scateu/pybombs-mirror","rel":"nofollow","children":"http://github.com/scateu/pybombs-mirror"}]," 脚本进行构建。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"使用示例","children":"使用示例"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"更新","children":"更新"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["由于 PyBOMBS 的 recipes 只能通过 git 仓库进行发布。而我们暂时不想维护一个复杂的 git 分支合并历史。所以更新时，需要将 recipe 仓库删除，然后再重新添加回来。(见",["$r","a",null,{"href":"http://lists.gnu.org/archive/html/discuss-gnuradio/2016-06/msg00170.html","rel":"nofollow","children":"讨论"}],")"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]

{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("pip3 install pybombs");t.b("
" + i);t.b("rm -rf ~/.pybombs");t.b("
" + i);t.b("pybombs recipes add gr-recipes git+");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/recipes/gr-recipes.git");t.b("
" + i);t.b("pybombs recipes add gr-etcetera git+");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/recipes/gr-etcetera.git");t.b("
" + i);t.b("mkdir gnuradio-prefix");t.b("
" + i);t.b("cd gnuradio-prefix");t.b("

" + i);t.b("gnuradio-companion");t.b("
");t.b("
